mapper.select: SELECT equipment_id, equipment_name, location AS equipment_location, status AS equipment_status, remark AS equipment_message FROM equipment
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment (equipment_name, location, status, remark) VALUES (#{equipmentName}, #{equipmentLocation}, #{equipmentStatus}, #{equipmentMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT equipment_id, equipment_name, location AS equipment_location, status AS equipment_status, remark AS equipment_message FROM equipment WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}

SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.location AS equipment_location, e.status AS equipment_status, e.remark AS equipment_message FROM equipment e JOIN class_equipment ce ON e.equipment_id = ce.equipment_id WHERE ce.class_id = #{classId}

SELECT equipment_id, equipment_name, location AS equipment_location, status AS equipment_status, remark AS equipment_message FROM equipment
AND ( CAST(equipment_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY equipment_id ASC
